hero.title: Stop Online Art Theft. Protect Your Portfolio.
hero.subtitle: TSMO Watch protects your creative pieces from AI training. Upload your work, apply style cloaking, download the protected image, and upload it to your portfolio. And monitor it 24/7 with TSMO Watch reverse image search.
hero.audience: TSMO Watch was created for Independent artists, designers, musicians, small-to-mid-size creative brands

features.title: Powerful Features for Complete Protection
features.subtitle: Our comprehensive suite of tools ensures your creative work is protected across all digital platforms.

visualRecognition.title: Visual Recognition
visualRecognition.description: Advanced AI scans images and artwork across millions of websites and social platforms

deepWebScanning.title: Deep Web Scanning
deepWebScanning.description: Comprehensive search through marketplaces, social media, and content platforms

instantAlerts.title: Instant Alerts
instantAlerts.description: Real-time notifications when unauthorized use of your work is detected

autoDocumentation.title: Auto-Documentation
autoDocumentation.description: Automatic evidence collection and timestamping for legal proceedings

legalSupport.title: Legal Support
legalSupport.description: Direct connection to IP lawyers and automated cease & desist generation

analyticsDashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
analyticsDashboard.description: Track your work's reach, unauthorized usage patterns, and protection metrics

blockchainVerification.title: Blockchain Verification
blockchainVerification.description: Immutable proof of creation and ownership through blockchain technology

artistCommunity.title: Artist Community
artistCommunity.description: Connect with other artists, share protection strategies, and learn from experts

apiIntegration.title: API Integration
apiIntegration.description: Seamlessly integrate with your existing workflow and portfolio platforms

trademarkMonitoring.title: Trademark Intelligence
trademarkMonitoring.description: AI-powered trademark monitoring, similarity analysis, and automated legal workflows across global jurisdictions

cta.title: Ready to Protect Your Creative Work?
cta.subtitle: Join artists protecting their creative work with TSMO.
